regime: waitlist (strict). Birchal's own CSF offer is NOT live until 26 June 2026 (OFFER-CONTEXT). All 16 bodies pre-offer compliant: no transaction verbs, no $ minimum, no preferential-terms framing, verbatim CSF risk warning byte-exact as the final line of every primary_text.
structure: 4 angles x 4 hook-distinct variants = 16 bodies. Within each angle the 4 variants differ primarily in the hook (first 1-2 sentences); body adapted to fit the hook (JB-permitted 2026-05-18). Built to learnings-meta-ad.md #5 + Generation prompt addendum (8 structural gates).
gates_enforced: Hook >=4 on hook_audit.py in --primary-text mode (strict first-sentence gate) AND every standalone/ad headline >=4.
One idea per sentence; open with ONE verified number (or Caples Why on a verified number) as a complete sentence, full stop, then a turn; no comma-spliced stat-triplet openers.

Reader is the grammatical subject at the turn and the CTA. CTA = literal email micro-action 'Leave your email and we will tell you the moment the offer goes live' (WAITLIST-CTA 2026-05-18 default; cta button field = approved 'Save my spot' verbatim).
No third-party company names in the bridge. Plain concrete nouns. One proof point per beat.
Primary text 65-90 words, body only excluding the mandatory 12-word verbatim CSF terminator (learnings #2 governs; body range 71-87). Headlines <=8 words, sentence case.

BANNED-CSF-PHRASES / PREOFFER-VERBS / VERBATIM-OFFER-LANGUAGE / BRAND-EXCLUDED / DOLLAR-MIN: zero matches. No FarmThru / cross-client contamination. No em/en dashes or smart quotes in any shipped field.

Every empirical claim traces to a facts.json fact_id. Banned AI-tell words only inside attributed verbatim quotes (documented QUOTE-007 / QUOTE-009 exemptions), zero leak into surrounding prose (humaniser-confirmed).
plat005_status: PLAT-005 (more than 64% of CSF in Australia) used ONLY in the 4 DOM bodies, at most once per ad, registered scoped wording, 'crowd-sourced funding in Australia' scope inline (not headline-dependent), never combined with #1/first/largest/leading, paired with the verified spine. facts.json source_status OPEN: verbal JB authorisation only, exact public citation (Birchal CSF Yearbook / published share-of-funds) MUST be attached before any DOM ad is marked live. DOM ads are DRAFT/JB-review safe but NOT live-ready until the citation is closed.
_post_verify_fixes: Adversarial verify 2026-05-18 (NO-GO as batch; 2/18 fail, 0 blockers). Resolved: DOM3 headline+description and headline H5C-DOM-05 carried a bare unscoped 'more than 64%' in Meta-independently-rotating fields (PLAT-005 rule #2). Rescoped to 'Where over 64% of Australian CSF went' (hook_audit 5/5, 7 words) and 'More than 64% of Australian CSF ran one way. Leave your email.' Every DOM share claim now scoped inline in every rotating field. MINOR #5 (reader-subject-at-turn on 5 quote-led ads, structurally forced by endorsement-before-turn) and #7 (INV1 'back us' verb, QUOTE-001-defensible) left for JB in-sheet review per the verify classification.
